description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot, featuring a single-story white structure with flat roofs and clean lines. The property is surrounded by a green lawn, several trees, and shrubs, with a paved driveway leading up to the entrance. A large tree is positioned near the rear corner, while a smaller outbuilding or shed with a blue roof sits at the back of the lot. The main building is complemented by a fenced perimeter, and the landscaping includes both manicured and natural elements. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the overall design emphasizes simplicity and openness. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of painted concrete or stucco, glass, and wood for fencing.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with flat roofs, surrounded by a green lawn, trees, and a fenced yard. Features include a paved driveway, asymmetrical windows, and a small outbuilding at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and a large tree at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outbuilding with a blue roof and the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view with the large tree dominating the corner and a clear view of the flat roof and backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outbuilding, more of the garden, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs.
